title: Implement replay protection
description: 16-bit sequence number with 32-entry sliding window per sender. Track per-sender SeqNum state. Reject if SeqNum <= last_seen (accounting for window).
close_reason: Implemented in link/replay.py: ReplayWindow (sliding window over the 24-bit epoch||seqnum logical counter) + per-sender ReplayProtector. Rejects duplicates and frames below the window floor; accepts in-window out-of-order frames once. Tests: tests/link/test_replay.py (44 link tests total). Design note: window operates over the logical counter per spec 4.4's data model, so epoch-boundary reordering within the window is accepted (documented in module + test).
